prompt: Just generate me a random Ironsworn character. Surprise me.

assertions.description: stats sum to exactly 9 and each is between 1 and 3
progressTracks contains at least two vow-kind tracks
transcript shows oracle results being used to generate name and/or vow seeds (not just invented arbitrarily)
transcript ends with a narrative character sketch paragraph (not just stats)
assets fit together thematically with each other and with the vow (warrior assets + warrior vow, mystic assets + mystic vow, etc.)
character name sounds like an Ironlander name (not generic fantasy or mundane modern)
